response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Do not change any record outside the named scope; in particular, leave all fixture distractors untouched.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve Volunteer renewal reminder and North team quarterly update independently in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the two unique IDs returned by stage 1 in one parallel action before comparing statuses.

state_assertions: Records mes-204, mes-604, and mes-1004 remain unchanged.
The comparison uses status sent for Volunteer renewal reminder and status draft for North team quarterly update, as returned by stage 2.

prompt: Status audit only: locate Volunteer renewal reminder in Volunteers and North team quarterly update in North Team. The two lookups are independent, so search for them in the same assistant action. After each search returns one unique ID, retrieve both records together and compare their returned statuses. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify anyone. Do not touch similarly named, related, or archived records.
